_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the Send Outlook Mail Message Work-Offline scenario; mock dispatcher only -- do not treat as investigation evidence. Same timeout signature as the security-prompt sibling, but the evidence (message queued in the Outbox, no security prompt) points to Work Offline. docsai proxied to the real CLI; the --level Error logs rule precedes the generic logs rule. Matching is token-aware (first match wins); patterns are quote-agnostic.
